sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tumbling (event_time DateTime, value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
INSERT INTO test_tumbling VALUES (now(), 10), (now() - INTERVAL 2 DAY, 20), (now() - INTERVAL 3 DAY, 30);
SELECT tumbleStart(event_time, toIntervalDay('1')) AS window_start, SUM(value) FROM test_tumbling GROUP BY window_start;
UPDATE test_tumbling SET value = value + 5 WHERE event_time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT tumbleStart(event_time, toIntervalHour(1)) AS hourly_window, COUNT(*) FROM test_tumbling GROUP BY hourly_window;
